title: Enforcement Gate Request
description: Binding contract for a gate evaluation request (ENF-02). Produced by Phase 8 gate hooks; consumed by GateAdapter.evaluate(). taskSignal single-sources the caller matchable signal via $ref to the existing task-signal schema $id (no inline copy). rules[] carries the selected rule summaries that flowed into this gate. x-binding: binding — enforcement routes through this contract.

gateId.description: The GSD loop gate being requested (5-step loop).

phase.description: Current AI-DLC phase. Mirrors src/types.ts Phase enum.

taskSignal.description: The caller-supplied matchable signal (SEL-01). $ref to the existing task-signal schema by $id — single-sources the signal contract; Ajv must have task-signal.schema.json registered via addSchema before this schema is compiled.

rules.description: Selected rule summaries flowing into this gate (AuditAppliedRule shape from src/governance/audit-artifact.ts).

appliedRule.description: A selected rule summary. Mirrors AuditAppliedRule (src/governance/audit-artifact.ts lines 22-28) field-for-field — the same shape the audit writer emits.

matchedAxis.description: The trigger axis that fired (MatchedAxis enum).
